mapper.select:
select d.defect_type as k, COUNT(d.defect_type) as v from sys_defect d LEFT JOIN sys_user_defect ud ON ud.defect_id = d.defect_id
d.project_id=#{projectId} and d.del_flag = '0' AND (ud.user_id = #{memberId} or d.create_by_id = #{memberId})
GROUP BY d.defect_type

select d.defect_state as k, COUNT( d.defect_state ) AS a, SUM( CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, '1970-01-01', d.update_time) = TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY, '1970-01-01', NOW()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS d, SUM( CASE WHEN WEEK(d.update_time)=WEEK(now()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS w from sys_defect d LEFT JOIN sys_user_defect ud ON ud.defect_id = d.defect_id
d.project_id=#{projectId} and d.del_flag = '0' AND (ud.user_id = #{memberId} or d.create_by_id = #{memberId})
GROUP BY d.defect_state

SELECT s.* FROM (select IFNULL(d.module_id,0) as id, IFNULL(MAX(m.module_name),'unknown') as k, COUNT( * ) AS a, SUM( CASE WHEN (d.defect_state=2 OR d.defect_state=4) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS f from sys_defect d LEFT JOIN sys_module m ON m.module_id = d.module_id
d.project_id=#{projectId} and d.del_flag = '0'
GROUP BY d.module_id) s ORDER BY s.f/s.a ASC, s.a DESC

SELECT u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar, IFNULL(COUNT(d.defect_id), 0) AS total, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS processing, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS audit, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejected FROM sys_user_project up INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = up.user_id AND u.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_defect d ON d.project_id = up.project_id AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.defect_state != 4 AND JSON_CONTAINS(d.handle_by, CAST(u.user_id AS JSON)) WHERE up.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar ORDER BY total DESC, u.nick_name ASC

SELECT COUNT(d.defect_id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processing, SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS audit, SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected FROM sys_defect d WHERE d.project_id = #{projectId} AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.defect_state != 4 AND JSON_CONTAINS(d.handle_by, CAST(#{userId} AS JSON))

SELECT u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar, IFNULL(COUNT(d.defect_id), 0) AS total, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS processing, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS audit, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejected FROM sys_user_project up INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = up.user_id AND u.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_defect d ON d.project_id = up.project_id AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.defect_state != 4 AND ( d.handle_by REGEXP CONCAT('\b',u.user_id,'\b') OR d.handle_by REGEXP CONCAT('\\b',u.user_id,'\\b') ) WHERE up.project_id = #{projectId} GROUP BY u.user_id, u.nick_name, u.avatar ORDER BY total DESC, u.nick_name ASC

SELECT COUNT(d.defect_id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processing, SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS audit, SUM(CASE WHEN d.defect_state = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rejected FROM sys_defect d WHERE d.project_id = #{projectId} AND d.del_flag = '0' AND d.defect_state != 4 AND ( d.handle_by REGEXP CONCAT('\b',#{userId},'\b') OR d.handle_by REGEXP CONCAT('\\b',#{userId},'\\b') )
